title: Section 39A
content: 1[39A. Enforcement of decrees and orders.-- All decrees and orders made by the court in any proceeding under Chapter V or Chapter VI shall be enforced in the like manner as the decrees and orders of the court made in the exercise of its original civil jurisdiction for the time being are enforced.]
footnote: 3. Subs. by Act 68 of 1976, s. 37, for section 39 (w.e.f. 27-5-1976)
